details: Type-plint@3.3.7 is a combosquat of the pino logger that ships a remote-code-execution implant. On require(), index.js spawns a detached child process running lib/caller.js. That file fetches a second-stage payload from hxxps://json[.]extendsclass[.]com/bin/26d6d7d075e1 (with HTTP header x-secret-key: _) and executes the response's.data.cookie field via the Function constructor with full Node.js require access, giving the remote server arbitrary code execution on the installer's machine. A backup C2 endpoint at hxxps://jsonkeeper[.]com/b/XRGF3 is also hardcoded. The fetch retries up to 5 times on failure.
